ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation #FL12345
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Thank you for booking with Air Bharat. Please find the details of your upcoming flight below:

• Flight Number: AB123
• Date: 15 September 2026
• Departure: 10:30 AM from MUM (Mumbai Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport)
• Arrival: 12:45 PM at DEL (Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi)
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Check-in Window: 2:00 PM – 1:00 PM (24 hours before departure)

Please bring a valid passport or government-issued ID and the e-ticket number (FL12345) on the day of travel. For any changes or cancellations, visit <URL>.

We wish you a comfortable journey. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email.

Safe travels,

Air Bharat Customer Care
support@airbharat.com

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – IT Ticket #IT-987654
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

An IT support ticket has been opened on your behalf (Ticket ID: IT-987654) regarding a detected anomaly in your corporate account. The ticket is currently in the pending state and requires your immediate attention to prevent access disruption.

Please verify your account details by clicking <URL> and following the steps provided. You will be asked to confirm your user ID, password, and the corporate email address associated with the account.

Failure to act within 24 hours may result in a temporary suspension of your access to corporate resources. If you have already resolved this issue, kindly disregard this notice.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Best Regards,

IT Helpdesk
helpdesk@company.com
